top_signals.title: Stocks Extend Advance as US-Iran Deal Draws Closer: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks and bonds extended their rallies as fresh confirmation emerged that the US and Iran are nearing a deal to end their war, along with new details from the draft agreement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Prices Tumble 4% on Iran Peace Optimism
top_signals.summary: Oil prices plunged by more than 4% early on Friday as the market hopes the U.S. and Iran have made progress toward a peace deal. As of morning trade in Europe, the international benchmark, Brent Crude, had slipped by 4.34% at $86.36, extending the losses from Thursday when U.S. President Donald Trump called off a strike on Iran, claiming that a deal had been reached. The U.S. benchmark, WTI Crude, had dipped by 4.47% at $83.88. Both benchmarks were headed to a three-month low amid one of the most optimistic signals about a deal coming from the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Volatility in markets has not changed positive outlook for gold
top_signals.summary: It’s important to remember that gold does not always move upward in a straight line, even during crises.

top_signals.title: Banks Line Up €1.7 Billion of Debt for Triton’s Flender Buyout
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bank AG and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. are among banks that have lined up around €1.7 billion ($1.97 billion) of debt financing that will back Triton Partners’ acquisition of German gearbox-maker Flender GmbH.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Indian Developer Prestige Plans $6.3 Billion in Project Launches
top_signals.summary: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd., which counts BlackRock Inc. and Vanguard Group Inc. among its investors, is targeting about 600 billion rupees ($6.3 billion) in estimated sales value for this financial year as the developer prepares to launch projects across the country, its billionaire founder said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kazakhstan ground view: What you can’t see from the spreadsheet
top_signals.summary: A first look at Kazakhstan reveals why critical minerals, trade routes, and geopolitics now converge there.
